Holy Trinity Grammar School Road, off Old Ife Rd, Ibadan
Our Story

A Venue Built for Celebration

Bashmol Event Center stands as Ibadan's most distinguished venue for life's most meaningful celebrations. Nestled along Holy Trinity Grammar School Road, our sprawling facility combines architectural grandeur with modern amenities to deliver an unmatched event experience.

Whether you are planning an intimate gathering or a grand celebration for hundreds, our dedicated team ensures every detail is executed with elegance and precision. From the moment your guests arrive to the final farewell, Bashmol transforms occasions into timeless memories.

Our Spaces

Every Event
Finds Its Home

From intimate dining to grand ceremonies, our versatile spaces adapt to every vision and occasion.

The Grand Hall
Capacity: up to 500 guests. Perfect for weddings and grand ceremonies.
Weddings · Ceremonies
The Dining Suite
Fully furnished dining space with catering facilities for 200 guests.
Dinners · Receptions
The Celebration Room
Intimate and vibrant. Ideal for birthdays, anniversaries and corporate events.

Why Choose Us

Everything You Need

⚡
Steady Power Supply
Industrial CAT generators ensure your event is never interrupted. 24/7 uninterrupted power guaranteed throughout your event.
🛣️
Excellent Road Access
Well-paved approach roads with easy access from Old Ife Road. Ample parking space for hundreds of vehicles.
🔒
24/7 Security
Professional security personnel on-site round the clock. Your guests and valuables are always safe with us.
🍽️
Full Catering Facilities
Fully equipped kitchen and catering infrastructure. Bring your caterers or use our recommended partners.

Venue Today

Secure your preferred date at Bashmol Event Center. Select your hall type, choose your dates, and complete your reservation online in minutes. Our team will confirm your booking within 24 hours.
